title: アオハル杯5戦目・勝利を掴んで

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Happiness has come! Fortune is here! We've done
it, team! We've won in great fashion!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Yeehaw! Shower on down, happiness! We've
wooon!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Phew! Looks like Team Zenith's been on one heck
of a training arc too, though!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
For sure! They've been crankin' up the heat, huh?
How exciting!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: W-we did it! We won together!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
You did awesome out there, Rice! I'm so proud of
you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to our team's victory, Operation
Oversight is called off.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The freedom of the academy is safe once more.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ms. Kashimoto sits among the cheering crowd,
her eyes fixed on a single point.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: So... we lost, then.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Just then...

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text:
Trainer Kashimoto! Did you see us out there?!
Listen to this!

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text:
We timed ourselves this morning! I clocked 2
minutes 24.5 seconds, Little Cocon got 3 minutes
4.8 seconds, and...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bitter Glasse reads out the team's best times in a
rush.

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text:
We all ran faster than our target times! And we all
felt satisfied with our race performance, so
please—

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text: Please come back to us as our trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Suddenly, Little Cocon is in the stands too,
breathless and flushed.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Little Cocon!

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
The reason I was able to beat my target time was
that there's something I sought to change!

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
You mean so much to me as a trainer, and I
admire you so much!

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
That's why I wanted to destroy the misguided
beliefs you've clung on to for so long!

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
We are so, so grateful that you watched over and
managed us so wholeheartedly.

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text: But from now on...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Little Cocon takes a deep breath to calm herself
down.

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
We want you to treat us as equals as we work
toward our goals!

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
We want to work with you as partners on equal
standing, not children that need to be
micromanaged!

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text: That's all I... That's all we want.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Partners on equal standing... Yes, you're right.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I watched you all race. Every one of you was
incredible. It made me realize that none of you
need me anymore.

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text: That's not tru—

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
But at the same time, I felt a strong desire to see
what lies ahead.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: To discover what the future holds for you all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ms. Kashimoto's eyes finally regain a small
sparkle of light.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
You all ran with such will and determination on
the track today. To say you exceeded my
expectations would be an understatement.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: It's been a very long time since I've felt this way.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ms. Kashimoto casts an affectionate eye over the
empty track.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
It's as you said. I need to be less scared... and
have more faith.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I need to learn to trust my runners as well as
myself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ms. Kashimoto heads down with Little Cocon to
the track where Team Zenith awaits.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, Ms. Kashimoto announces that
she's calling off Operation Oversight and
stepping down from her position as temporary
director.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What's more, in light of the possibility of future
Unity Cup events and the positive effects that
team training has shown, it's decided that all
registered teams are to remain together.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Seeing my racers for who they really are and
having an earnest conversation with them opened
my eyes to many things.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: I want to do better and start afresh.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ms. Kashimoto holds herself with a more relaxed
air than before. It's clear that she's finally come to
terms with something deep within herself.
choice_data_list: What are you going to do now?

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to Director Akikawa's generosity, I've
been allowed to work here as a trainer once more.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I hope to share the battleground with you and
your trainee again—this time in the Twinkle
Series.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: I'm looking forward to our next race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ms. Kashimoto quietly leaves my office with a
faint smile on her lips.

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text:
Oh, are you finally done with your talk, Trainer
Kashimoto? I wanted to ask you something about
tomorrow's training, but—

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text: Hey, not so fast! I got here first!

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
It's rude to yell in the corridor, you two. You can
ask me when we get to my office.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
You'll both get a chance to speak, so there's no
need to rush.

text_block_list.name: Cocon and Glasse
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Trainer Kashimoto!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can hear the three of them continue to chatter
excitedly even as their footsteps fade into the
distance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now that Ms. Kashimoto has overcome her past,
I'm sure her future with her racers will be bright.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She'll be an incredible rival in my future
endeavors, so I'll have to continue working hard
until the day comes to face her again!
